THE BACKROOMS

gyserspil til min mor

You noclipped into Level 0. Endless yellow halls. Flickering fluorescent lights. The hum of electricity that never stops. Find the pool rooms exit before something finds you. Stay moving — standing still too long draws its attention.

WASD to move  ·  MOUSE to look  ·  SHIFT to run  ·  F flashlight
LEFT joystick to move  ·  DRAG anywhere to look  ·  buttons to run / flashlight
Enhanced: A* monster pathfinding · footsteps · breathing · growls · head bob · screen distortion · insanity-driven flicker · prop furniture · sticky notes · exit portal
IT FOUND YOU click to respawn at the entrance

ENTERING LEVEL 2

The portal hums. Something shifts behind your eyes.
The Pool Rooms await.

click to continue

LEVEL 2

THE POOL ROOMS

Warm water. White tile.
No exit you can see.
